subject: Just launched: Vibe Coding Crash Course
body:
Денис, here's your early access to a brand new AI programming course.

Learn to vibe code without breaking everything.

*Note: You are receiving this platform-related update because you have an active Educative account. If you wish to unsubscribe from product or other updates related to your account, you can do so anytime.

We have been hearing from a lot of Educative learners requesting a pure vibe coding course. Here it is, just launched:

FEATURED COURSE

Vibe Coding: Build Real Apps Without Learning to Code

Start Learning → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/MWtbT3lzKcMW2JtCVd8fmDw4W3S9mTt5N9TxSN6crjq23prCCW95jsWP6lZ3lbW8ThRPH5wx6qYW6K_S1D175P0cW8WXyFb3XXqKDW6QzKfz2t46yQVtqkC067l0_BW8Tgn_r8m-KSRW214_zZ1FHm5LW1mJlzY16wNzNN8htv2WP7VLyW5DGT-P4BGxBgN8jPz4L9nKmlW7-8wLv7Bgw7VW3b18fg549p_nW6ZTLfj7VHV4PMJG1wZmfp1QW2dR-RG7nhYkkW74G4H0396ZjQN2Mwbm5R3FndW3HDd_b13VR2zW1_VvgM3Bq7PsW5zr4v52rljZHW27xC0k2R39qlN1NSmtrlg1xhT8dw21ptKnxW69-2l57ghHQXW8QQf2c4dZkm1V3dFl34B1FRpW21RTtY8vt5J8N2vcX3qNBRG3W6QlJqY58yrxzf5dP9lC04 )

Learn how to build full-stack web applications without writing code using Lovable and Claude Code. Go from product brief to a deployed booking app with authentication, payments, and a repeatable process for when AI-assisted development works — and when it doesn't.

More Recent Launches:

Mastering OpenAI Codex for Agentic Coding
Read more → (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/MWtbT3lzKcMW2JtCVd8fmDw4W3S9mTt5N9TxSN6crjm-5m_5PW50kH_H6lZ3mKW3lvWVw8JyTX3W3jZ80l1032rSW5tCGHC3GLpp2N5bLTbScRM9jVmL8Y14ZN9RpW5M4Jz39lQztPW55My4D7g1x8pW8KT14r45LWdzN76BXjkb8GQxN2jdc4pdkSdnN5B3WJQBf9GKVJ2PMH1k64vsVj4n0B5zPWzHW8XTTfk1wswwnVW-bcQ6JTfwHW8JDqT43FBLK-W17vr618QmQ_9W5WXJ-B2NYdbJN6519WV-qqL1W8Gvxf33MFdLpVNGV7K1-gfr0W50r7VR6bcYd7N8dlX0h2dPjYVmZXl33t1xN6W9dt8cs5XNbWHW7T1h6-45gZ69W6n9d3C7gQF3rW5gWVr14-1pVcW1YJVLB8dH2ZXW6wQD5j8pbqHzW8_3C7V3HM-ntW1n__2z5ltC_df6mmQrF04 )
